mapper.select: SELECT * FROM logical_table_relation WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND LOWER(source_table_name) = LOWER(#{sourceTableName}) ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT * FROM logical_table_relation WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND LOWER(source_table_name) = LOWER(#{sourceTableName})
AND LOWER(target_table_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')
AND is_enabled = #{isEnabled}
ORDER BY id DESC
ORDER BY id ASC
